Meaning: Something that is easy to understand or do.
Example: The test was a piece of cake for her.
Please do not beat around the bush; answer directly.

Idiom: Every cloud has a silver lining
Meaning: Every difficult situation has some good aspect.
Example: Even after a hard day, every cloud has a silver lining.
He stayed home because he felt under the weather.
The discussion got out of hand quickly.

Idiom: Hit the nail on the head
Meaning: To say or do something exactly right.
Example: Your explanation hit the nail on the head.
The call came out of the blue.
The residents were up in arms about the decision.
